physics_snapshots.method: flattened USD export after measured PhysX state

visual_boundary: The hand stage uses source closed-loop-informed, shell-free structural visuals whose follower poses follow measured Isaac joints in exported physics snapshots. Frame cores and passive linkages move with the measured eight hand DOFs; rounded outer shells disabled. This is source structural visual evidence only: no closed-loop PhysX, contact, or hardware claim is made.
